Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ozriel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Ozriel is the Eighth Judge of the Court of Seven and calls himself 'the Destroyer'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Ozriel wears smooth, liquid-like black armor and has long flowing white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Ozriel has intense blue eyes and pale skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Ozriel released his Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Ozriel is described by Kelarac as a furnace in which trash is disposed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Calder has met with Ozriel to experience conversing using only his consciousness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Ozriel is waiting beyond the world and has threatened to destroy it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Ozriel has spoken about his job if things escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Ozriel and Urg’naut regard one another across the abyss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Ozriel sent a message that was burned into the streets of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Ozriel is an Outsider who plans on killing everyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Outsider is Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel uses a scythe that crackles against a blue membrane over reality.}}

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel is a being who would try to save everyone but fail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Suriel was sent to hunt for Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Ozriel's designation is zero-zero-eight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Ozriel is gone.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Ozriel is known as the Reaper.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel is an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel wears polished black armor and the Mantle of Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel identified sixteen worlds that will be corrupted during his absence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel sent Ozriel's population to Pioneer 8089.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Ozriel is a person capable of disposing of a corrupted world without breaking it into toxic pieces.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel asks Suriel to verify if Ozriel is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Ozriel's death may have been staged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Ozriel was once part of the Hound's side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel is a man with pale skin, long angular face, pure blue eyes, and long streaming white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel is a descendant of those he left behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel's plan involves planting seeds in dying worlds to raise people outside the rules of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel's armor can billow a mantle of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel claims to have children who inherited his sight.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — The scythes used by Makiel are not creations of Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel is a being that can match Makiel in combat.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Ozriel is an Abidan who wears black armor and has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel's meddling changed things for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel possesses a marble that shows projections.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Ozriel's departure reduced the number of Abidan worlds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Ozriel is a person who possesses a Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozriel is the new name granted to Ozmanthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozriel is the founder of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozriel ascended to become the Abidan known as Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozriel seemed to be an ally to Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Ozriel's crest is a scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Any hint left behind by Ozriel could be a treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel is an authorized user of Personal Record 3349.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — When Ozriel reaps a world, he eliminates it perfectly from existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel was bound by the Eledari Pact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ozriel was the Arelius family Patriarch and once owned this room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Ozriel left the Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Ozriel left memories all over the Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Ozriel emphasized the use of a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Ozriel had a remaining dream tablet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Ozriel has a crest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel is an Abidan who left a beacon in Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel is addressed by Daruman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel is the greatest craftsman Cradle has ever produced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel is a Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan uses an authorization code 'zero-zero-eight' associated with Ozriel to release authority and remove restraints.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Ozriel has authority over Ozriel’s Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Ozriel is associated with the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan had cried as Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Ozriel is described as an irreplaceable asset to the Abidan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel possesses a Mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel is referred to as the Spider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Ozriel's workshops and foundries are marked with his scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel is a character who travels with Suriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel has manacled hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel wears black armor and has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel arrived unexpectedly and can make a significant entrance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel does not have his Scythe with him during this event.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel has a black gauntlet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel has a unique signature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Ozriel is a character who can be commanded by Suriel to intervene in conflicts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Ozriel is a figure the Abidan might execute for his crimes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Ozriel has stood trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Ozriel can access the private Abidan network for entertainment or education.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Ozriel's body has been perfected both genetically and conceptually.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel's authority can radiate into the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Ozriel can conjure a black sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan revealed himself as Ozriel after breaking his black marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel reached out for his Scythe when faced with destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel buried a weapon beneath the ice in the center of the Hound's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel's weapon is the Scythe of Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Scythe of Ozriel is described as a slice of darkness forged into metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel's Scythe was hidden beneath Makiel's home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Ozriel is fighting the Mad King's true self.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Dross suggests Yerin's feelings might be influenced by Ozriel or Ozmanthus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Ozriel is a being who was once the strongest in any given world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Ozriel is the creator of the Reaper's Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin learned to imitate Ozriel’s sword strike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ozriel vanished and left behind no dust or echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ozriel reappeared in a column of sapphire flames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Ozriel is a Judge who was considered not objective in the matter of the Executor program.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Ozriel is the eighth Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Ozriel is expected to interrupt Suriel and Lindon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Ozriel was a Judge who was compatible with only six of the seven disciplines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel is a Judge of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Ozriel crafted Mercy's bow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel was once qualified as the Judge for six out of the seven Abidan Divisions, including the Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel sent a baby Reaper to Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel is considered a traitor by Cirian for abandoning his divine responsibilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel has hidden his Scythe under Abidan control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel prepared the Reaper as an assassin for the Silverlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel is a figure who recruited the first generation of Reapers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel is known as the Reaper of Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel is delighted with Cirian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Ozriel abandoned his post.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ozriel is a Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ozriel has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ozriel is a member of the Court of Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ozriel uses a Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Ozriel makes weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Ozriel waited for the Judges to arrive after the Mad King was driven away.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
